sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current: rows 45-49, cols 24-28
# Path to top-left: RIGHT×3, UP×4, LEFT×5
# But first let me check exact position
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Orange: rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Blue: rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

# Try navigating to top-left corner
action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
